summary: A robust, enterprise-grade User Management System translating traditional Java/Spring concepts into a modern Next.js architecture. Features comprehensive Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), JWT authentication, secure API endpoints with validation, and a high-performance dashboard for managing users and subscriptions.
authReasoning: This is explicitly a 'User Management System'. It requires distinct 'Admin' (manager) and 'User' (consumer) roles to demonstrate the requested Role-Based Authorization. Security is the core product feature.
features: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC: Admin vs User)
Server-side Pagination & Filtering for User Lists
Mock Payment & SMS Gateway Integration UI
layoutStyle: Split-screen Dashboard: Left sidebar navigation for logged-in areas, Scroll Narrative for public landing page.
colorMood: High-contrast Security: Clean white backgrounds with sharp gray borders and high-energy Pink (#F2185D) accents for alerts and primary actions.
animationStyle: Micro-interactions: Smooth table row transitions, modal scaling, and button press effects.
uiPrompt: Create a professional, security-focused UI. Cards must use 'border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300'. Primary buttons should be 'bg-[#F2185D] text-white shadow-sm shadow-[#F2185D]/25 hover:shadow-md hover:brightness-110 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5'. Input fields require 'border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:border-[#F2185D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#F2185D]/20 outline-none transition-all'. Tables must be 'border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden' with 'divide-y divide-gray-100' and 'hover:bg-gray-50' on rows. Use 'border-l-4 border-[#F2185D]' for alert cards or active navigation states. All interactive elements must have hover states.

apiRoutes.description: Registers new user with Zod validation and password hashing
Paginated list of users with filtering (Admin only)
Soft delete or ban user (Admin only)

pages.description: Public landing page explaining the security features of the system
Overview of account status and recent activity
ADMIN ONLY: Full CRUD table for managing users (pagination, search, delete)
User profile settings, SMS preferences, and subscription status

components.name: UserTable
components.description: Complex data table with pagination controls, sorting, and row actions

components.name: RoleBadge
components.description: Visual indicator for Admin vs User roles with distinct colors

components.name: StatusToggle
components.description: Switch component to activate/suspend users instantly

components.name: PaymentModal
components.description: Mock payment gateway integration UI (Sandbox mode)

contentAreas.name: Hero Section
contentAreas.description: Headline: 'Enterprise-Grade User Management'. Subhead: 'Secure, Scalable, and Ready for Deployment.' CTA: 'Access Dashboard'

contentAreas.name: Security Features
contentAreas.description: Grid cards detailing JWT Implementation, RBAC Architecture, and Encrypted Data Storage.

contentAreas.name: Tech Stack
contentAreas.description: Showcase the modern migration: Next.js 15, Tailwind, and MongoDB (replacing legacy Java stack).

contentAreas.name: Integration Capabilities
contentAreas.description: Visuals showing SMS Notification and Payment Gateway support.

contentAreas.name: System Stats
contentAreas.description: Counter animation showing '99.9% Uptime', 'Zero Breaches', 'Fast API Response'.
